description: Centralized hotel catalog by destination for My Cusco Trip dynamic packages. It stores confidential net rates, a 25% hotel margin, estimated published prices with payment/withdrawal fees and metadata for a future private profit and discount view.

exchangeRate.notes: Should be migrated to currency-config.json when the multi-currency system is implemented.

hotelMarkup.description: The hotel margin is calculated before fees. The published price should allow receiving the net cost plus a 25% profit margin.

formula.rounding: round up to commercial USD ending .90

hotelDestinationMatching.description: Los hoteles se seleccionan por destino real de pernocte del package.

mapping.cusco: Usar hoteles del destino cusco para nights in Cusco.
mapping.machu-picchu: Para alojamiento, Machu Picchu se resuelve como aguas-calientes.
mapping.aguas-calientes: Usar hoteles de Aguas Calientes para la night previa o posterior a Machu Picchu.
mapping.arequipa: Usar hoteles de Arequipa si el package incluye pernocte en Arequipa.
mapping.puno: Usar hoteles de Puno si el package incluye Titicaca o pernocte en Puno.
mapping.lima: Usar hoteles de Lima si el package incluye pernocte en Lima.
mapping.paracas: Usar hoteles de Paracas si el package incluye pernocte en Paracas.
mapping.ica: Usar hoteles de Ica si el package incluye pernocte en Ica.

packageCalculation.customerPriceFormula: sum published prices from tours + machu picchu + hotels + trains + extras + hidden package service fee
packageCalculation.internalProfitFormula: sum target net revenue - sum real net costs
packageCalculation.discountGuardrail: Discounts should be calculated from total package margin and the minimum accepted margin, not from the gross package price.

hotels.summary: Three-star boutique hotel in a central area of Cusco. Recommended for packages with nights in Cusco thanks to its practical location for tours and transfers.
